description: The AvatarPoseFilterInstaller component can be placed into slots below or on the same Slot as a Proxy on an avatar in order to auto install a pose filter on those parts upon equipping the avatar.

fields.Filter: the Pose Filter to install on an Avatar's pose node like the head, hands, arms, or feet.
fields.Priority: If this installer should run before other IAvatarObjectComponents.

usage: Used to make an avatar with slow hands, or an avatar that has restricted movement with its limbs.
